in: Bilingual landing + 'what we do / don't' + Code of Conduct + anti-discrimination policy pages.
Submission form with the boundary engine (auto-reject group-target/incitement/no-source).
Reviewer console with dual-review + source verification.
Entity/Allegation/Source data model with hard constraints.
Published record: search + per-entry sources + evidence-strength label.
mvp.pre_launch_gate: Lawyer review of publication standard + first entries before any living person is named publicly.

phases.name: Foundations
phases.goal: Editorial standard, source tiers, legal review, governance. No code-naming yet.

phases.name: Public shell
phases.goal: Bilingual landing, policies, Code of Conduct, FAQ live; submission intake collecting (not yet publishing).

phases.name: Review pipeline
phases.goal: Reviewer console, dual review, boundary engine, data model, audit trail.

phases.name: First record (gated)
phases.goal: Publish initial Tier-A (UN/court/sanctions) entities only, after legal sign-off.

phases.name: v1 launch
phases.goal: Controlled public launch with partner endorsements + monitoring.
